title: scutellaria antirrhinoides
intro: Scutellaria antirrhinoides, also known as Chinese skullcap or Chinese harebell, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria antirrhinoides include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
